evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of noise cancelling headphones under $200 — results look solid.

final_response:
For the best noise-cancelling headphones under $200, look no further than the Sony WH-CH720N, priced at $149. These featherlight over-ear beauties pack a punch with their robust Active Noise Cancellation, courtesy of Sony's Integrated Processor V1, ensuring your auditory journey is blissfully distraction-free. The 30mm drivers deliver a balanced sound signature with just the right amount of bass, perfect for long flights or commutes. Comfort and performance come together like a match made in audio heaven, making these a top contender for your ears.

Want something cheaper? The Wyze Headphones at just $49 offer surprisingly effective ANC and a balanced sound profile, perfect for casual listeners. After longer battery life? The Audio-Technica Nova 3 boasts an impressive 50 hours of playtime for those marathon listening sessions. Looking for something more portable? The Anker Soundcore Liberty Air 2 Pro at $79 delivers excellent noise cancellation in a compact, in-ear design that's perfect for on-the-go experiences.
